summary: Iteration 172 testing complete: Predictive Wellness, Founding Architect Program, and Auto-Generation Hooks. All 21 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working.
seed_data_creation: User already has Founding Architect status with Elite tier (30% discount)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 172 features fully working. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/wellness/prescription (returns time_of_day, recommended_frequency, recommended_binaural, mood, mantra), GET /api/founding-architect/status (is_founding_architect=true, badge, perks with 30% discount), POST /api/founding-architect/redeem (validates codes, rejects invalid/already-founder), GET /api/fidelity/status (Elite tier, 30% discount), GET /api/content-broker/catalog (tier-based pricing with 30% discount applied), POST /api/soundscapes/save-mix (returns generated_asset with recovery_frequency type), POST /api/rpg/quests/complete (returns generated_asset with victory_mantra type). Frontend verified: Dashboard shows FOUNDER compact badge, Evening Prescription widget with 639Hz/Theta Dream/Reflective, Settings shows Founding Architect panel with Lifetime Elite and 30% Off badges.

predictive_wellness.GET /api/wellness/prescription: Returns time_of_day (morning/afternoon/evening/night), recommended_frequency (solfeggio Hz), recommended_binaural (alpha/theta/delta/gamma/beta), mood, mantra

founding_architect.GET /api/founding-architect/status: Returns is_founding_architect, badge, granted_at, perks (lifetime_elite_discount=30, badge_visible=true)
founding_architect.POST /api/founding-architect/redeem: Validates invite codes (COSMIC-FOUNDER-2026, RAPID-CITY-ARCHITECT, STARSEED-TESTER), grants Elite tier

elite_tier_discount.GET /api/content-broker/catalog: Shows user_tier=Elite, discount_pct=30, assets have pricing with discount applied

auto_generation_hooks.POST /api/soundscapes/save-mix: Returns generated_asset with id, name, type=recovery_frequency
auto_generation_hooks.POST /api/rpg/quests/complete: Returns generated_asset with id, name, type=victory_mantra

frontend_ui.dashboard_founding_badge: FOUNDER compact badge visible next to greeting
frontend_ui.cosmic_prescription_widget: Shows time-of-day label, Hz frequency, binaural preset, mood tag, mantra
frontend_ui.settings_founding_panel: Shows Founding Architect title, Award icon, Lifetime Elite badge, 30% Off Everything badge, granted date
